CREATE TABLE test_arrays (array1 Array(Int32), array2 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) AS jaccard_index FROM test_arrays;
SELECT (SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) FROM test_arrays) AS nested_jaccard_index;
SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(arr, [10, 20]) AS jaccard_from_table FROM array_test;
SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(arr, arr) AS jaccard_self_similarity FROM array_test;
SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) FROM (SELECT [1, 2] AS array1, [2, 3] AS array2);
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT arrayJaccardIndex(array1, array2) AS j_index FROM test_arrays) WHERE j_index > 0;
